caption:
Your past is speaking through your relationships, but you have the power to rewrite the script.

Cancer, you've always been a people-pleaser, sacrificing your own needs for the sake of love and connection.
But deep down, you know that's not sustainable. You're tired of being drained, of feeling invisible, of being taken for granted.
The truth is, your childhood trauma has conditioned you to seek validation from others, to believe that your worth is tied to their approval.
But today, I want you to know that you are enough, just as you are. Your worth isn't defined by anyone else's opinion.

You've been living someone else's dream, but it's time to wake up and start living your own.

Lucky number: 6
Lucky color: Turquoise
Today's vibe: TRUST

Take a deep breath and commit to loving yourself, flaws and all.

Music provided by musicinmedia (https://pixabay.com/users/musicinmedia/)

#cancer #astrology #horoscope #emotionalhealing

script.hook: Your past is speaking through your relationships, but you have the power to rewrite the script.
body: Cancer, you've always been a people-pleaser, sacrificing your own needs for the sake of love and connection.
But deep down, you know that's not sustainable. You're tired of being drained, of feeling invisible, of being taken for granted.
The truth is, your childhood trauma has conditioned you to seek validation from others, to believe that your worth is tied to their approval.
But today, I want you to know that you are enough, just as you are. Your worth isn't defined by anyone else's opinion.
It's time to break free from the patterns that have held you back for so long and start trusting yourself again.
script.reveal: You've been living someone else's dream, but it's time to wake up and start living your own.
script.cta: Take a deep breath and commit to loving yourself, flaws and all.
script.wound_theme: Lack of self-trust due to childhood trauma
script.affirmation: I trust myself and my instincts, and I know I'm capable of creating the life I want.
